unity_mobile_notes: Frame count shown as inclusive keys for planning; Unity duration is approximately frame_span / fps.
For FBX to Unity, export baked deform bones only where possible and avoid exporting control/helper bones if not needed.
Mobile budget depends on skinned mesh vertex count, bone count, active skinned meshes, texture sizes, and number of simultaneously playing Animator layers.
Loop locomotion/idle clips in Unity and keep one-shots such as bark/attack/hurt non-looping.
